final:
module RefModule(output reg [7:0] reg_0x60, input wire reset, input wire wenb, input wire [7:0] in_data, input wire clk);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always@(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt)
	begin
		if(reset == 1) // reset
			reg_0x60 <= 8'h00;
		else if(wenb == 1) // write data
			reg_0x60 <= in_data;
	end
endmodule
